description: GitHub Actions Deployment Fix + Content Review with Business Analyst
changelog: Fix GitHub Actions workflow YAML syntax errors
Debug and resolve deployment automation issues
Review and update page content with business analyst
Content improvements based on BA feedback

steps.description: Debug GitHub Actions workflow via incremental pushes
approach: Push each change to main branch separately
test_sequence: Push 1: Minor content change to Homepage
Push 7-N: Additional content updates from BA review
benefits: Isolate workflow failures to specific steps
Verify each deployment succeeds before next

steps.description: Business analyst review of all pages
tasks: Document content change requests per page
Update one page at a time
Push to main after each page update (triggers deployment)
Verify deployment success before next page
Review tone, messaging, and value proposition

steps.fallback: Use manual SCP if GitHub Actions still fails

rollback_plan: Restore pages from restore/pages/ backup, revert workflow changes

automated: GitHub Actions workflow validates without errors
Workflow runs successfully on push to main
manual: Review all pages with BA - content approved
Check page load times and responsiveness

filesModified: Page content files (to be updated post-BA review)
notes: GitHub Actions has been blocking due to YAML syntax errors
Manual deployment via SCP worked successfully for v3.7.4
Need to resolve automation before next release
BA review will inform content strategy for public launch
